title: EOE and NGE advice
wikitext:
[]: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by Billyboy17 » Mon Mar 28, 2016 8:55 pm Hey guys! I'm fairly new here and I am wondering if you guys can help me out a bit with some questions? First. I have finished watching Neon Genesis, Death & Rebirth (and now I find out that its filler), and End of Evangelion. What I am wondering if there is any extras, cuts, something! I loved the ending to EOE but I feel I want more of it. I want to know what happens even after the world has been reborn and its just the two of them. Does it continue in a comic/Manga and if so where would I find it? Its like after watching like I have developed an addiction to it. I don't know why but, I would love to see this show grow even more. Hell I would even love to see if they could somehow continue the story. Secondly. I am looking into buying the books but I am wondering if there was a sort of an all in one? Or a 3-in-1 kinda book. Third. I maybe a little foolish to ask but are their any plans for a extended story? Like how Shinji and Asuka had to restart humanity. I would like to thank you guys very much. If there is anything else related to EOE or NGE, like OVA, Directors cuts, or fanfic even.

[]: Re: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by zlink64 » Mon Mar 28, 2016 9:10 pm Um I dont think you should count death and rebirth as "filler" but yeah it's extra I guess. There are director cut versions of episode 21-24. They add a lot of new content in there so it's worth checking out. There's a manga version of the show that is different. You don't have to read it and is probably the least impressive version of the story according to the masses but if you want more check it out. It's interesting if anything. You can get the volumes on amazon. There are also fan service manga versions of the show. I forget the name of those though. They are okay if you are into that stuff and want more eva just for the sake of it. Basically they are like light hearted, fan service versions of the story. There is no continuation of evangelion so you'll have to check out fan fiction for that void. They are remaking/retelling the series in a set of 4 movies. 3 of those 4 have been released already, even in dub at this point. You can get the dvd's on amazon or just watch them on the internet. You might like those a lot. Look up Evangelion Rebuild and you'll find info on them. These movies are more of a different retelling than a regular remake so it's worth checking out.

[]: Re: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Mar 28, 2016 9:53 pm Billyboy17 wrote: Third. I maybe a little foolish to ask but are their any plans for a extended story? Like how Shinji and Asuka had to restart humanity.

[]: Re: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 28, 2016 10:18 pm robersora wrote: I can't find the source now

[]: Re: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 29, 2016 12:56 am Billyboy17 wrote: First. I have finished watching Neon Genesis, Death & Rebirth (and now I find out that its filler), and End of Evangelion. What I am wondering if there is any extras, cuts, something!

[]: Re: EOE and NGE advice             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Mar 29, 2016 1:44 am Billyboy17 wrote: Hey guys! I'm fairly new here and I am wondering if you guys can help me out a bit with some questions?
